---
title: "Contact"
---

I'm always glad to connect with researchers, students, and groups working on coral reefs,
marine genomics, and ocean science.

- **Email:** [maarenaso@unal.edu.co](mailto:maarenaso@unal.edu.co)
- **LinkedIn:** [linkedin.com/in/maarenaso](https://www.linkedin.com/in/maarenaso)
- **GitHub:** [github.com/maarenaso](https://github.com/maarenaso)
- **Location:** Medellín, Colombia
